nasb.text: For now I have chosen and consecrated this house that My name may be there forever, and My eyes and My heart will be there perpetually.

esv.text: For now I have chosen and consecrated this house that my name may be there forever. My eyes and my heart will be there for all time.

cnv.text: 現在我揀選了這殿，把它分別為聖，使我的名永遠在這殿中；我的眼和我的心也常常留在那裡。

ccb.text: 我已选择这殿，使之圣洁，永远归在我的名下，我的眼和我的心必常在那里。
